description.en: UnionPay is a Chinese financial services company operating the UnionPay card scheme and global acceptance network for debit, credit, and prepaid card payments via UnionPay International.

api_fields.value: CUP, China UnionPay, UnionPay Card, Ginren

tip: If UnionPay approvals are low, check issuer-required fields (billing details, cardholder name) and whether 3DS is expected for your transaction type.

faq.question: What is UnionPay?
faq.answer: UnionPay is a card scheme and payments network that enables card payments (debit, credit, prepaid) in China and internationally.

faq.question: Do I integrate directly with UnionPay?
faq.answer: Most merchants accept UnionPay through a payment service provider (PSP) or acquiring bank that supports UnionPay processing.

faq.question: Can I accept UnionPay online and in-store?
faq.answer: Yes—UnionPay can be accepted for ecommerce and point-of-sale payments, depending on your acquirer/PSP configuration and region.

faq.question: Why are my UnionPay transactions being declined?
faq.answer: Declines commonly come from issuer decisioning, missing/invalid billing data, unsupported transaction types, or authentication outcomes. Review decline codes from your PSP/acquirer and improve submitted data quality.

faq.question: Does UnionPay support 3D Secure?
faq.answer: Many integrations support 3D Secure (where applicable). Availability and requirements depend on your PSP/acquirer and the card issuer.

faq.question: How do UnionPay disputes work?
faq.answer: Disputes are typically handled as chargebacks through your acquiring bank/PSP. Collect strong evidence (receipt, delivery proof, authentication results) to respond.

seo.seo_title: UnionPay payments: accept UnionPay cards globally
seo.seo_description: UnionPay is a major card network enabling online and in-person card payments globally, typically via a PSP or acquirer.
seo.keywords: UnionPay,UnionPay International,card network,accept UnionPay,UnionPay processing,3D Secure,chargebacks
